[Fact]
public async Task NotifyAsync_WhenConfigurationAndQueueAreValid_ShouldCreateEmailAndSend()
{
    // Arrange
    var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService>>();
    var dataverseRepoMock = new Mock<IDataverseRepository>();

    var logId = Guid.NewGuid();
    var queueId = Guid.NewGuid();
    var emailId = Guid.NewGuid();

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity => entity.LogicalName == "tpc_logs"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(logId);

    var configResults = new EntityCollection(new List<Entity>
    {
        new Entity("tpc_configurationkeies")
        {
            ["tpc_name"] = "SenderConfig",
            ["tpc_value_singlelinetext"] = "DIA Error Queue"
        },
        new Entity("tpc_configurationkeies")
        {
            ["tpc_name"] = "RecipientConfig",
            ["tpc_value_singlelinetext"] = "test1@example.com;test2@example.com"
        }
    });

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "tpc_configurationkeies"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(configResults);

    var queue = new Entity("queue")
    {
        Id = queueId
    };

    var queueResults = new EntityCollection(new List<Entity> { queue });

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "queue"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(queueResults);

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity => entity.LogicalName == "email"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(emailId);

    var service = new DiaExceptionNotificationService(
        loggerMock.Object,
        dataverseRepoMock.Object);

    // Act
    await service.NotifyAsync(
        sendErrorEmail: true,
        logError: true,
        logErrorTitle: "Test title",
        logErrorProcessName: "DIA",
        errorEmailBody: "Test body",
        errorEmailSubject: "Test subject",
        senderConfigKey: "SenderConfig",
        recipientConfigKey: "RecipientConfig",
        logErrorFormattedError: "Formatted error",
        logType: "428910002");

    // Assert
    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity => entity.LogicalName == "tpc_logs"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "tpc_configurationkeies"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
            It.Is<QueryExpression>(query => query.EntityName == "queue"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.CreateAsync(
            It.Is<Entity>(entity =>
                entity.LogicalName == "email" &&
                entity.GetAttributeValue<string>("subject") == "Test subject" &&
                entity.GetAttributeValue<string>("description") == "Test body"),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.ExecuteAsync(
            It.Is<OrganizationRequest>(request =>
                request.RequestName == "SendEmail" &&
                request.Parameters.Contains("EmailId") &&
                request.Parameters.Contains("IssueSend") &&
                (Guid)request["EmailId"] == emailId &&
                (bool)request["IssueSend"] == true),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Once);
}

Add happy path test for DIA exception email notification
